_comment: Pinned build inputs, fetched into third_party/ as plain git clones by scripts/fetch_sources.sh. NOT submodules by design: SwiftPM recursively initializes submodules of git dependencies, which would make every consumer clone the full Skia + HarfBuzz history (~1.1 GB) for a ~23 MB binary product.

skia.note: m150 (SkMilestone.h), canvaskit/0.41.0 lineage; term-kit production pin

harfbuzz.note: reports 14.2.0; post-14.2.0 main commit, term-kit production pin
